chapter_goal: Use global boundary data to inspect simple closed curves, area, isoperimetry, and curvature vertices.

library_routing.why: sampled curve predicates and durable labeled 2D diagrams
exact ellipse check plus numerical boundary integral visualization
static comparisons plus an interactive parameter sweep
nonnegative residual terms are visible as plotted functions and bars
robust periodic extrema detection and hypothesis checks

visual_sequence.inspection_target: interior/exterior probes, inward normal, and self-crossing failure
signed Green density and cumulative area
same-area shapes, quotient bars, and deficit heatmap
parameter sweep showing Q decrease under a radial perturbation
Wirtinger and angular residuals in equality and perturbed cases
detected curvature extrema on convex and self-crossing examples
periodic primitive behind the four-vertex proof contradiction
